rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for key assumptions and missing evidence, though not comprehensively for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output mostly within scope with minor drifts in added sections.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
